effectData.name: (おとこのこ,
effectData.method: Found in Geometry World through the lone doorway northwest of the main entrance. Go in, and interact with the object at the end of the corridor until it doesn't change color anymore. Then exit the corridor, and interact with the outline figure that walks near the door to get this effect.

effectData.name: (チェーンソー,
effectData.method: Found at the Hospital Outskirts by stepping on the red circle, then entering the mouth of the vomiting diamond located to the west of the entry point 3 times, looping around from the back to the front to re-enter it. Interact with the chainsaw stuck in the ground in the completely black area to obtain the effect.

effectData.name: (ようせい
effectData.method: Found in the Black Building. Once in the building, take the elevator up and go into the room at the end of the hallway. Interact with the fairy in the cage to get the effect.

effectData.name: (うちゅうふく,
effectData.method: Found in Flying Fish World. After entering from the Dark Museum, go through the elevator you came from twice, then head left and enter the one at the end of the platform. Next, go into the doorway at the rightmost edge, back into it once more, then head into the leftmost door on the next two platforms. After this, enter the next door over on the right, then make your way down and to the left to the next door. Go through the elevator on the right two times, then out of the final two at the right edge of the platform enter the second one. Go right from where you're dropped off and you'll come across the effect lying on the ground.

effectData.name: (にじ,
effectData.method: Found in plain sight northeast of the Rock World entrance in Theatre World.

effectData.name: (おおかみ,
effectData.method: Found at the end of the Teleport Maze. Enter the teleporters in the following order: right, right, up-left, right, right. Step on the white teleporter to enter an enclosed beach area, and interact with Ookami within to get the effect.

effectData.name: (めだまばくだん,
effectData.method: Found in the Mini-Maze. The effect, which appears to be a spinning bomb, is located deep within the maze and is visible on the maze's map.

effectData.name: (くろでんわ,
effectData.method: Found in the Dark Room by interacting with Oni Musume's pet telephone.

effectData.name: (まいこ,
effectData.method: Found in the Shinto Shrine, near the Sakura Forest entrance, after interacting with the Maiko Ghost.

effectData.name: (ツインテール,
effectData.method: Found in the Deciding Street. Enter the building near the south entrance and then equip the Telephone effect. After a while, the purple figure will walk over and use Urotsuki to make a call, prompting a short cutscene in which you obtain the effect.

effectData.name: (ぺんぎん,
effectData.method: Found in the Penguin Game. It is automatically obtained when entering the area.

effectData.name: (むし,
effectData.method: Found at the Scenic Outlook in the altar area, accessed through the stone pillar behind the bug guard. Interact with the small flying bug just north of the entry point to obtain the effect.

effectData.name: (バネ,
effectData.method: Found in an isolated section of the basement in the Apartments, which can either be reached from the main Apartments area or from the School (the latter being much faster). Interact with Bane Jack found in the room you arrive in to obtain the effect.

effectData.name: (とうめい,
effectData.method: Found at the end of the Invisible Maze. Interact with the purple silhouette to obtain the effect.

effectData.name: (がくラン,
effectData.method: Found in Monochrome Feudal Japan in the island area with different music, accessed through one of the eye buildings in the castle area. At the end of the upper path is a blue-skinned boy in dark clothing; interact with him to obtain the effect.

effectData.name: (はにわ,
effectData.method: Found in the Haniwa Temple. Interact with the gray haniwa at the end of the path the get the effect.

effectData.name: (ケーキ,
effectData.method: Found in Cutlery World. Travel south until you reach the fence, hug the wall and travel west, then go south through the closest opening in the fence. Repeat these steps with the second fence. Once you reach the third layer, head east until you find a silver fork; interact with the fork, then travel west across the path and up the neck of the giant fork. Interact with the cake-headed girl in the yellow dress to obtain the effect.

effectData.name: (こども,
effectData.method: Found in a room in the Pyramid Maze of the Hourglass Desert, accessed from the egg in the uterus-shaped area at the end of the Ocean Floor. Interacting with the egg with the pattern of Urotsuki's shirt in the room will give you the effect.

effectData.name: (てるてるぼうず,
effectData.method: Found at the end of the Dark Stairs in the Dark Alleys.

effectData.name: (マージナル,
effectData.method: Found in the Broken Faces Area by interacting with the Marginal Vivid Worker.

effectData.name: (ドラムかん,
effectData.method: Found in Purple World. Northwest of the map is a large oil drum. Interacting with it will cause the lid to be removed and you will obtain this effect. After this, Urotsuki falls into Onyx Tile World.

effectData.name: (おはか,
effectData.method: Found in Graveyard World by interacting with the little walking gravestone near the Hospital's entrance.

effectData.name: (ふみきり,
effectData.method: Found in Heart World by interacting with the railroad crossing sign just southwest of the entrance to the Deciding Street. The railroad crossing sign is only visible after collecting at least 15 effects.

effectData.name: (うさみみ,
effectData.method: Using the Glasses effect in the Library will make a new book appear in the southmost row of bookcases in the first room that takes Urotsuki to the Eyeball Archives. Still using the Glasses, collect the sparkling black book on a table to the west and then return to the Library. A book-like NPC will be running around the area—catch it and then return to the Eyeball Archives (using the Crossing effect will make this task much easier). The previously locked desk gate to the north will now open for you while you are wearing the Glasses. After breaking through some caution tape, you will reach a ladder guarded by three Eyeball NPCs. You can make them leave by going into the bar to the left and paying the NPC in the right corner 20夢 to play you a song, which Urotsuki will sit and listen to. At the top of the now unguarded ladder, walk north and look up at the moon to reveal the effect-giving NPC, a pink rabbit head, standing behind you.

effectData.name: (サイコロ,
effectData.method: Found in Acerola World by interacting with the cycloptic dice, Saikoro-kun, who rolls horizontally across the area.

effectData.name: (説明書,
effectData.method: Present from the start of the game.

wallpaperData.name: 館長の娘
wallpaperData.method:
Multiple requirements (see here).
  • Enter the southernmost room of the Dark Room, where Oni Musume is located.
  • Enter the Apartments. This is to unlock the book that serves as a shortcut between Apartments and Library.
  • Interact with all the books in the first three rows of the Library and read all their pages. This requirement only applies if text events are enabled; if disabled, the requirement is to enter the Hourglass Desert instead.
    • This includes the book that serves as a shortcut to the Apartments, but excludes the book in the third row two shelves to the right of the ladder.
wallpaperData.methodJP: 文字イベントONの場合、夢幻図書館の本をすべて読む

Visit all the landmarks on this wallpaper (see here).

  • Enter Garden World (Daytime).
  • Enter Sign World A.
  • Enter Visine World and the path to Guts World from this area.
  • Enter the Hourglass Desert.

wallpaperData.method:
Multiple interactions (see here).
  • Set a Monmon on fire using the Lantern effect in Marijuana Goddess World.
  • Go into the small room backstage in the Dark Room's theatre where the mushroom creatures are.
  • Touch the piano in Snowy Pipe Organ that takes Urotsuki to Atlantis.
  • Visit the river in the Tribe Settlement.
  • Enter the TV gallery in the pink faces area at the Underwater Amusement Park.
  • Watch the pyramid dancers event in the brown eye area at the Underwater Amusement Park.
  • Interact with either of the pink/blue NPCs in the pink TV faces area at the Underwater Amusement Park, or chainsaw the blood-vomiting character in the secret room.
  • Visit Farm World A.
  • Enter Farm World B from Rough Ash World.
  • Find the submarine at the Docks.
  • Enter the UFO in the Head Wasteland.
wallpaperData.methodJP: 釈迦世界でもんもんをカンテラで燃やす、劇場で水色生物の部屋に入る、パイプオルガンのグランドピアノを調べる、原始人の村の川のあるエリアに到達する、カーニバルナイトで三角ダンサーのダンスを見る、カーニバルナイトでジグザグの通路に入る、カーニバルナイトでリング生物に話しかけるか吐血さんをチェーンソーで斬るかどちらか達成する、庭の北側・南側エリア両方に到達する、霧の湖の潜水艦にたどり着く、円錐と目で赤い宇宙船の階段を登る

Meet all the characters on this Wallpaper (see here).

  • Interact with the creatures on the other side of the river at the Tribe Settlement.

wallpaperData.methodJP: 赤い世界でカンテラを使用し背景を変化させる

wallpaperData.name: Dimension World
wallpaperData.method:
See every minor event in Flying Fish World (see here).
  • Get the Glasses effect from the Dark Museum.
  • Visit Smile-San and use the Telephone effect to make him laugh.
  • Use the Fairy effect in the Urban Street Area to make the turntables appear and play music on them.
  • See Nichiyo-san at the bus stop while she is in sprite form, on the way to Urotsuki's Dream Scene in Flying Fish World. This has a 1/8 (12.5%) chance to appear each time the room is entered.
  • Enter the monochrome room in Flying Fish World and interact with the big eye on the wall, then watch the fullscreen event.
  • Use the Telephone effect in the TV room of Flying Fish World to cover the screen with static.
  • Unequip the Spacesuit effect while in Space.
  • Sit on the block in the Twin Mountains section in Flying Fish World.
  • Visit various areas and unlock their BGMs:
    • The Clock Room in Flying Fish World
    • The Monochrome Room with the large eye in Flying Fish World
    • The balcony in Helmet Girl's room
    • The Moonlit Purple Balcony in Flying Fish World
    • Flying Fish World's "hidden seed room", where the Glasses effect is needed to trigger the event
    • The small playground in Space
wallpaperData.methodJP: リベンジビル周辺に行き、一通りのSR分室解除とサブイベントを起こす(エフェクト「めがね」を入手する、待ち人遭遇、時計、怒りと血涙のイベント、白い部屋のベランダイベント、夜景ベランダ、水槽と本棚のある鉢植え部屋、夕焼けの箱に登って体育座り、宇宙滑り台から墜落、市街地でDJ、スミレさんに黒電話、古き良きテレビで黒電話)

wallpaperData.name: 虚から月へたどる
wallpaperData.method:
Make your way to Lavender Waters using a specific route.
  • Please note to specifically enter the Mushroom Room in Floating Catacombs. Missing it will prevent unlocking the wallpaper.

The route that must be taken is the following:

  • Nexus → Marijuana Goddess World → Dark Room → Snowy Forest → Techno Condominium → Cotton Candy Haven → Wooden Polycube Ruins → Nocturnal Grove → Lost Creek → Cloaked Pillar World → Viridescent Temple → Floating Catacombs (Mushroom Room) → Fossil Lake → Subterranean Plant → Aurora Lake → Rainfall Ruins → Lavender Waters
wallpaperData.methodJP: 劇場(ソファ部屋含む)、目覚めの森、コンドミニアム、星見屋上、haven、ポリキューブ、幽谷、人柱、白亜の塔、絞め殺しの木(キノコ)、化石湖、オーロラ湖、黒い雨、紫湖に到達する

Meet the requirements related to the characters on this wallpaper (see here).

  • See the five different forms of the Wintry Attendant in Wintry Cliffs.

Meet with all characters on this wallpaper (see here).

  • Interact with the bluish-gray NPC inside His House in Lost Forest.
  • Interact with The Lamplighter in Rainy Town.

wallpaperData.name: まんまる red face
wallpaperData.method:
Find all the red faces shown on this wallpaper (see here).

  • Enter the first area of Head Wasteland.
  • Enter the large red monster room (similar to Yume Nikki's Big Red) that leads to Wind Tunnel in Abandoned Factory.

  • Enter Intestines Maze from the Smokin' HAL in Geometry World.
  • See the monochrome boy change to red on the Namakubi Path in the Shinto Shrine.
  • Use the Lantern effect in the Secret Society's dark room.
  • Chainsaw the sitting NPC in the Library's Reading Room.

wallpaperData.name: 旅のお供
wallpaperData.method: Have at least 50 HP/Heart Points (Purchase at least 49 snacks from the Vending Machine).

wallpaperData.method: Sleep 34 times.

wallpaperData.method: Enter the bridge to Summer Sky Coast in Morning Suburbs, the main area of Summer Sky Coast, and Urban Heights.
